PREPPER.ManageSpellLists: Manage Prepared Spell Lists with PF2e Prepper

popup.namePrompt: Enter a name for this spell list:
popup.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this spell list?
popup.loadConfirm: Loading this list will replace your current prepared spells. Continue?
popup.resetConfirm: Resetting will replace your list with the current actor's prepared spells. Continue?

loadWarning.reasonBadSpell: spell error in saved list. Please remove the spell.
loadWarning.reasonNotOnActor: spell no longer exists on this actor.
loadWarning.reasonNoSlot: no available slot at spell rank.
